nasb.text: But the man who was healed did not know who it was, for Jesus had slipped away while there was a crowd in that place.

esv.text: Now the man who had been healed did not know who it was, for Jesus had withdrawn, as there was a crowd in the place.

cnv.text: 那醫好了的人不知道他是誰，因為那裡人很多，耶穌已經避開了。

ccb.text: 那人不知道是谁，因为那里人多，耶稣已经躲开了。

csbs.text: 那得了痊愈的人并不知道他是谁，因为那里有一群人，而耶稣已经抽身离去了。
